questions.stem: What does an eval harness primarily pin?

distractorMisconception.1: Conflates the prompt with the full harness.
distractorMisconception.2: Confuses scoring with the harness as a whole.
distractorMisconception.3: Mistakes the eval substrate for the model under test.

questions.explanation: A harness pins prompts, decoding, and scoring so score deltas reflect capability.

questions.stem: Why does the harness need to fix decoding parameters?
options: So score deltas attribute to the model, not the sampler
So the prompt can be shorter
So humans can grade more easily

distractorMisconception.2: Wrong: prompt length is independent of decoding fixing.

questions.explanation: Floating decode params leak sampler-noise into score deltas.
